examples.title: Algorithm: Linear Search
examples.description: Linear search algorithm to find an element in an array
examples.code:
ALGORITHM LinearSearch(arr, n, key)
INPUT: arr (array), n (size), key (search element)
OUTPUT: index of key if found, -1 otherwise

BEGIN
 for i from 0 to n-1 do
 if arr[i] == key then
 return i
 end for
 return -1
END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step explanation of the linear search algorithm
